_README: Manual editorial tags per episode, keyed by episode GUID. These are MERGED with tags derived automatically from the season (see lib/tags.ts: Heidegger seasons -> 'heidegger', Nietzsche -> 'affirmation', a season's Critique theme -> 'critique'). Add entries like "<guid>": ["teaching", "critique"]. Use slugs from src/data/tags.ts. Keys starting with '_' are ignored.
